subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Within them is ordained every goodly remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله نزلت بالحق من جبروت الله المهیمن القیوم و فیها قدر کل ذکر خیر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Manifestation of God as sun
